oracle_note.text: 5-path convergence (P1+P3+P4+P5+Assessor). Recovery 78/98 + Buffett 88 SQ. DIP to $306. ABOVE zone ($290-310). GTC $305 bid. +8 conf bump.
P1 BUY 83/70. Rupert Resources vote Jun 9. Assessor SB HIGH FV $280. BUT GLD -6.2% 20d selloff is macro headwind. Downgraded from +5 to +3 conf.
CEO $23.9M buy. DIP alert $38.93 pulled THROUGH zone floor. Fwd PE 5.9, 32% rev growth. P3 SC 77. Assessor SB HIGH FV $57.50. Entry revised $38-44.
New P3 entry. Flow +12.0/3d streak. 54% down. Durable domain registrar. Enter on dip below $83. +5 conf.
Best empirical contrarian: 66.7% WR on 39 P3 signals. AT zone floor $10.80-11.10. -5.3% in buy list. Enter limit $10.80-11.10.
$96B backlog. B-21 sole-source. F/A-XX Aug 2026. Heatmap 80 inflated (space bias). Assessor BUY MED FV $675. Fundamental case real despite inflation.
#2 PICK. PDUFA Jul 7. BTD+Priority+NEJM. FDA alignment Jun 2. IN ZONE $32-37. Binary +60-100%/-40%. Half-size for binary.
$4M CEO+Director cluster buy at multi-year lows. Fwd PE 15x. $6.3B FCF. Ultreon 3.0 AI imaging cleared. 3-expert assessor convergence. Entry $88-95.
Post-earnings DIP $50.47 into zone ($46-51). Assessor BUY HIGH $65 FV. CONDITIONAL: verify earnings beat before entry. If miss, zone invalid.
C-suite cluster $2.08M (CEO+CFO+CSO 5/13 at ~$144). Now 8.4% ITM. Fwd PE 14.2. Assessor BUY MED FV $175. +8 conf.
#5 PICK. Triple C-suite buy $554K. Buffett 84. IN ZONE $57-63. Non-binary quality compounder. Limit $60-62.
#1 PICK. PDUFA Jun 28 (23d). IN ZONE $64-72. Flow 10d avg +8.9. Royalty model (low binary risk). +10 conf, 0.95 certainty.
CATALYST_ENTRY fired $16.51 midday. 4-path convergence. PDUFA Jun 30 confirmed (veligrotug, Priority Review, TED). GTC $15.50. +10 conf bump.
REMOVED from blocklist. Assessor SB HIGH: activist proxy victory FIRED (ISS+Glass Lewis supported). 6-person exec cluster buy. 7x fwd PE. Reassessing.
